'''Paxxi Derida''', or "Pilot", as his disguised name, was a [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. A former thief, he caused a fuel leak on purpose to land on [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]], the plan being to stop the [[Syndicat]], secretly let his brother, [[Guerra Derida]], board and hide until both made it to the surface of the planet. With the help of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], they managed to bring down the Syndicat. An invention of Paxxi's, the [[Anti-register device|anti-register]], played a role in the scheme.

With the downfall of the Syndicat, Paxxi and Guerra began running the office of governor.

{{Char-stub}}
